Has a history or current evidence of any condition, therapy, or laboratory abnormality that might confound the results of the trial, interfere with the subject's participation for the full duration of the trial, or is not in the best interest of the subject to participate, in the opinion of the treating investigator.\n24. A patient may be excluded if, in the opinion of the treating investigator, the patient is not capable of being compliant.",
          "minimum_age": "18 Years",
          "maximum_age": "70 Years",
          "sex": "ALL",
          "source_id": "ctgov:NCT07343986"
        },
        "query_ids": [
          "pdq-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-modality"
        ],
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT07343986",
          "ctgov_search:protocol_design:pdq-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-modality"
        ],
        "provenance": "protocol_design.ctgov_search_plan_execution"
      }
    ],

    "protocol_design_brief": {

      "executive_synopsis": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-executive-synopsis",
        "title": "Executive Synopsis",
        "body": "Draft strategy brief for hEGFRvIII-CD3 (BRiTE) in glioblastoma. The target registry record is NCT04903795, PHASE1, and this artifact requires human review before protocol use.",
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT04903795",

        "title": "Strategic Rationale",
        "body": "Rationale is grounded in Agent 3 clinical-risk context, Agent 4 diligence findings, and public analog trial benchmarks. Endpoint risk is low; missing or low-confidence upstream items are carried as flags.",
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT04903795",

      "analog_trial_benchmark_summary": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-analog-benchmark",
        "title": "Analog Trial Benchmark Summary",
        "body": "Analog benchmark uses 10 selected CT.gov analog trials. Enrollment median 39.0 participants, mean 52.8, range 7.0-160.0, IQR 39.0, missing 0; planned duration median 44.8 months, mean 44.0, range 19.3-79.4, IQR 22.93, missing 0. Primary endpoint families: other: 19, safety: 8, survival: 4, response: 3. Comparator categories: active_comparator_or_combination: 7, single_arm_or_uncontrolled: 3. Limitations and missing fields are carried as flags.",
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT04903795",

      "target_population": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-target-population",
        "title": "Target Population",
        "body": "Draft target population follows the public target trial record: condition Newly Diagnosed Glioblastoma, Recurrent Glioblastoma; sex ALL; minimum age 18 Years; maximum age unknown. Human review should confirm biomarker, line-of-therapy, organ function, and safety exclusions.",
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT04903795"
        ],
        "assumptions": [],
        "missing_data_flags": [],
        "confidence": 0.65

        "title": "Study Design",
        "body": "Draft design should be benchmarked against selected analog trials for randomization, blinding, arm count, duration, and enrollment burden; no final protocol design decision is made by Agent 5.",

      "endpoint_strategy": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-endpoint-strategy",
        "title": "Endpoint Strategy",
        "body": "Draft endpoint strategy should align with analog endpoint-family frequencies and the target trial primary endpoint family: response. Statistical review is required before endpoint hierarchy or powering assumptions are used.",
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT04903795",
          "agent_output:clinical_outcome_prediction:clinical-outcome-prediction-output-b5ba0087-9aa7-4b12-9b43-b80d45aa30fa",

      "draft_eligibility_framework": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-eligibility-framework",
        "title": "Draft Eligibility Framework",
        "body": "Draft eligibility framework should start from analog themes. Inclusion themes: age; diagnosis; consent; performance status; measurable disease. Exclusion themes: infection; pregnant; organ function; cardiac; prior therapy; metastases. Safety themes: infection; pregnant; organ function; cardiac; qt; toxicity.",
        "source_ids": [
          "ctgov:NCT04903795",
          "rxnorm:hegfrviii-cd3--brite",

      "draft_schedule_of_assessments_framework": {

        "title": "Draft Schedule Of Assessments Framework",
        "body": "Draft schedule should cover screening, baseline, treatment visits, response/safety assessments, biomarker or diagnostic testing when applicable, end-of-treatment, and follow-up. Visit timing remains a human-reviewed design choice.",

      "safety_monitoring_outline": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-safety-monitoring",
        "title": "Safety Monitoring Outline",
        "body": "Safety monitoring should incorporate openFDA label context when available and safety exclusion themes from analog trial eligibility criteria. This is a review prompt, not a final safety plan.",

      "statistical_analysis_skeleton": {
        "section_id": "pd-db6ad705-7ffd-43ea-bd26-90f05cf15d39-stats-skeleton",
        "title": "Statistical Analysis Skeleton",
        "body": "Statistical skeleton should define estimand, analysis population, primary analysis method, multiplicity, interim review, and missing-data handling after biostatistician review; Agent 5 does not invent powering assumptions.",

          "ctgov:NCT04903795",
